_comment: Layer-3 post-processing corrections (CLAUDE.md 'Handling Unknown Words'). Maps a recurring wrong transcription -> the correct three-script output. Keys are matched case-insensitively as whole substrings after inference. EXPAND from real fine-tuned outputs in full_audio_samples/compare_transcripts/ and the first production batch. English stays English, Urdu in Nastaliq, Arabic in Arabic.
